nasb.text: It came about at the end of twenty years in which Solomon had built the two houses, the house of the Lord and the king’s house

esv.text: At the end of twenty years, in which Solomon had built the two houses, the house of the Lord and the king’s house,

cnv.text: 所羅門用了二十年的時間來建造耶和華的殿和王宮這兩座建築物。

ccb.text: 所罗门用二十年的时间兴建了耶和华的殿和自己的王宫。
